nasb.text: At that time, when David saw that the Lord had answered him on the threshing floor of Ornan the Jebusite, he offered sacrifice there.

esv.text: At that time, when David saw that the Lord had answered him at the threshing floor of Ornan the Jebusite, he sacrificed there.

cnv.text: 那時，大衛見耶和華在耶布斯人阿珥楠的禾場上應允了他，就在那裡獻祭。

ccb.text: 大卫见耶和华在耶布斯人阿珥楠的麦场上应允了他的祷告，就在那里献祭。
